---
title: "**Update on the $a_\\mu^{\\text{HLbL}}$ calculation in Bern**"
description: "Talk at the ETMC meeting in Cyprus"
author: "Simone Romiti"
date: "2025-12-05"
categories: [workshop, presentation]
# image: "/files/images/placeholder2.JPG"
page-layout: full
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

**25-27 March 2026**: I attended the ETMC internal workshop in Nicosia, Cyprus.

# Information about my talk

I gave a [talk]() at [Cyprus Institute](https://www.cyi.ac.cy/) in [Nicosia, Cyprus](https://maps.app.goo.gl/fXFDLSjEjrRoCfBs5) for the [ETMC meeting](https://indico.global/event/16475/).
I presented the the progress of the Bern group on the HLbL contribution to $(g-2)_\mu$: light flavors ($u,d$) [fully connected and 2+2 disconnected] and the heavy quarks $s,c$ [fully connected].


[![](https://indico.global/event/16475/attachments/67284/130435/A98_9418%20(1).JPG)](https://indico.global/event/16475/)


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
